buildCommand: export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH"; if ! command -v rustup >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y --profile minimal --default-toolchain stable; fi; rustup target add wasm32-unknown-unknown; cargo install trunk --version 0.21.14 --locked; trunk build --release
